phase_dir: ad-hoc (no phase directory — quick task work)

completed_tasks.name: Fix 1a — System prompt: add <contact_captured> tag instruction
completed_tasks.notes: Emma now outputs <contact_captured>{name, email}</contact_captured> the moment name + email are confirmed. Placed before the existing <lead_data> instructions in CONVERSATION RULES.

completed_tasks.name: Fix 1 (banner) — move setLeadCaptured + analytics into data?.success block
completed_tasks.notes: Banner and analytics now only fire after /api/lead returns success:true. leadCapturedRef.current still set early to prevent re-entry.

completed_tasks.name: Fix phone validator — hard 10-digit enforcement + normalization
completed_tasks.notes: Strips non-digits, drops leading country code 1 if 11 digits, requires exactly 10 digits. Also normalizes phone before storing.

completed_tasks.name: Fix session bug — don't set leadCaptured from stored session
completed_tasks.notes: Only restores fubPersonId from session, not leadCaptured. flushTranscript now gates on fubPersonId only.

remaining_tasks.name: Fix 1b — Chatbot.tsx: detect <contact_captured> tag, fire partial /api/lead
remaining_tasks.details: After stream completes, check for <contact_captured> in fullText. If found and !partialLeadFiredRef.current, parse {name, email}, fire /api/lead with partial:true. Store returned fubPersonId. cleanContent() must also strip <contact_captured> tags.

remaining_tasks.name: Fix 2 — /api/lead: write FUB transcript note synchronously on full lead capture
remaining_tasks.details: In app/api/lead/route.ts, after createFUBLead succeeds and body.partial is falsy, call createFUBNote(personId, transcript) fire-and-forget. Prefix note with '[Captured at lead collection]' to distinguish from sendBeacon full transcript.

remaining_tasks.name: Fix 3 — Chatbot.tsx: localStorage transcript buffer + visibilitychange
remaining_tasks.details: Three sub-changes: (1) saveTranscriptToStorage() helper — write messages+personId to localStorage key 'parker_transcript' after every assistant message, preserving existing personId if present. (2) loadTranscriptFromStorage() helper — read, validate 24h expiry, return {messages, personId}. (3) flushTranscript() reads from localStorage (falls back to refs), add visibilitychange listener alongside beforeunload. Do NOT delete from localStorage after sendBeacon — let 24h expiry handle cleanup.

human_actions_pending.action: Clear localStorage and test full flow after implementation
human_actions_pending.context: Use Playwright browser_evaluate to clear parker_chat_session and parker_transcript before testing

decisions.decision: Use <contact_captured> tag (not client-side NLP) to detect name+email capture
decisions.rationale: Reliable — same pattern as <lead_data>. NLP detection of email in stream is fragile.

decisions.decision: Partial lead fires without transcript note; full lead writes transcript note synchronously
decisions.rationale: Partial lead has minimal conversation — no value in a note. Full lead has the complete capture conversation.

decisions.decision: Don't delete localStorage after sendBeacon — let 24h expiry handle it
decisions.rationale: sendBeacon is fire-and-forget — can't confirm success. Fix 2 is the guaranteed baseline; Fix 3 is best-effort enhancement.

decisions.decision: partialLeadFiredRef prevents double-firing <contact_captured> across multiple messages
saveTranscriptToStorage preserves existing personId if already stored
decisions.rationale: personId arrives async from partial lead API call — subsequent saves shouldn't overwrite a valid personId with null.

next_action: Implement Fix 1b in Chatbot.tsx: add partialLeadFiredRef, update cleanContent to strip <contact_captured>, detect tag after stream, fire partial /api/lead. Then Fix 2 in app/api/lead/route.ts. Then Fix 3 localStorage in Chatbot.tsx.
context_notes: Paid traffic is live on parker.affordablecondos.ca. This work is critical — any lead lost from a paid click is money wasted. The three fixes form a layered safety net: Fix 1 catches leads before all 6 fields, Fix 2 guarantees transcript in FUB at capture time, Fix 3 makes sendBeacon reliable via localStorage buffer. All changes are in uncommitted modified files — nothing is lost, just not committed yet.
